TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sipazi‚Äô, title = Sipazi‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sipazi‚Äô} }

S.FORM: alang Sipazi' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 377 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 349 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 71%, saySiyat 19%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sipazi' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sipazi' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sipazi' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sipazi' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Sipazi' hya' ga Kawabata. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sipazi' ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 377 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 349 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 28 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 71%, saySiyat 19%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sipazi' hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sipazi' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sipazi' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sipazi' hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'llaw na Sipazi' hya' ga Kawabata. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēipazi Ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu …£pńßo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, s~…ēajs~…ēijat **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤unun *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēipazi Ē ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na s~…ēipazi Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēipazi Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēipazi Ē ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēllaw na s~…ēipazi Ē ńßja Ē …£a kawaő≤ata. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
